title: Fix Picklist Mapping Production Regression and Improve Layout
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the picklist mapping UI to handle long value labels cleanly, so that I can map picklist values without excessive horizontal scrolling.
description:
A production deployment accidentally hid the mapping button. After reverting, an additional UX improvement was made to handle long picklist value labels that caused horizontal overflow.

### UX Improvement
Long picklist labels were causing the offcanvas panel to require horizontal scrolling. The fix wrapped labels at 50% width so the source value and target dropdown render on the same line without overflow. Waqar also proposed an Excel-like Handsontable interface for future improvement.
acceptance_criteria: Mapping button is visible in production
Long picklist labels wrap without causing horizontal scroll
ux_changes: Picklist mapping labels wrap at 50% width. Source value and dropdown render on same line without horizontal overflow.
middleware_changes: Reverted accidental hiding of mapping button. Fixed picklist mapping display logic.
implementation_notes: 30-minute fix. Waqar suggested future enhancement using Handsontable for an Excel-like picklist mapping experience.
comment_summary: Waqar reverted the hidden button and applied CSS wrapping for long labels. Ryan approved the improved layout. Waqar proposed a future Handsontable-based interface.
